description: Wire deliverable verbs onto the §8 lifecycle: create (id-gen+stage), claim (set claimant; the one hardcoded already-claimed guard), unclaim (clear), update (generic edit), close/drop (stage tasks/<id>.md deletion, bl-op close|drop). NO review verb, NO init verb. Plugin reactions layer on via P5/P8/P9.
title: §9 core verbs: create/claim/unclaim/update/close/drop (no review, no init)
